tasks.description: Add aria-labels to all 16 sidebar navigation links and the footer button for screen reader accessibility (WCAG 4.1.2). NAV_ITEMS already have `label` field — use it as the `aria-label` on each Link. For the footer 'All Workspaces' link/button, add aria-label='All Workspaces'. Also add aria-label to the header logo Link ('Back to workspaces'). The sidebar collapsed state already hides text labels, making aria-labels essential.
acceptance_criteria: All 16 nav Link elements have aria-label matching their label field from NAV_ITEMS
Footer 'All Workspaces' Button has aria-label='All Workspaces'
Header logo Link has aria-label (e.g., 'Back to workspaces')

patterns_to_follow: aria-label pattern already exists on Toggle sidebar button (line 117), color picker in settings (line 558)
learnings_relevant: Lucide-react no title prop — use aria-label instead

tasks.special_instructions: NAV_ITEMS array has `label` field — add `aria-label={item.label}` to the Link at line 132. For the bottom Link at line 157, add `aria-label="All Workspaces"`. For the header Link at line 103, add `aria-label="Back to workspaces"`. BUG-047 references a 'footer SVG submit button' — this is actually the 'All Workspaces' button (line 158) which is a Button with LayoutDashboard icon. Add aria-label there.

tasks.description:
Fix AI Insights export section being enabled when no AI analysis has been run (BUG-044), and add sr-only h1 to canvas page (BUG-049). For BUG-044: the check `!!(workspace.settings?.last_analysis_at)` at line 317 may be truthy when settings is an empty object or last_analysis_at is a stale/default value. Add a stricter check: also verify workspace.settings?.last_analysis exists and is non-null. For BUG-049: add `

[tab name or workspace name]

` as first child of canvas container, matching BUG-037 pattern used in tools-canvas-view.tsx.
acceptance_criteria: AI Insights checkbox is disabled in export dialog when workspace has no AI analysis cached
AI Insights checkbox is enabled when workspace has a cached analysis (last_analysis is non-null AND last_analysis_at is non-null)
Canvas page has an h1 element (sr-only) with workspace or tab name
Export dialog still works correctly for all other sections
tasks.special_instructions:
For BUG-044: Change line 317 from `const hasAiInsights = !!(workspace.settings?.last_analysis_at);` to `const hasAiInsights = !!(workspace.settings?.last_analysis_at && workspace.settings?.last_analysis);` — require both the timestamp AND the cached result to be present. For BUG-049: Add `

{tab?.name || workspace.name}

` as first child of the outermost container in the return JSX. The `tab` variable should be available from context or props — check what's available.

tasks.description: Three small accessibility fixes in separate files: (1) BUG-046: Associate workspace name label with input in settings/page.tsx — add htmlFor='workspace-name' to the <label> and id='workspace-name' to the input. (2) BUG-050: Wrap /workspaces page content in <main> landmark. (3) BUG-051: Add aria-label='Steps' to the data table in step-list-view.tsx.
acceptance_criteria: Settings page workspace name input has a programmatic label association (htmlFor/id or aria-labelledby)
/workspaces page has a <main> landmark element wrapping content
Step list table has aria-label='Steps' or a <caption> element
Visual rendering unchanged in all three views

patterns_to_follow: htmlFor + id pattern for label association

tasks.special_instructions: BUG-046: Line 183 of settings/page.tsx has `<label className="text-[12px]...">Workspace Name</label>`. Add `htmlFor="workspace-name"` to the label. Find the corresponding input and add `id="workspace-name"`. BUG-050: In workspaces/page.tsx, wrap the main content area in `<main>`. BUG-051: In step-list-view.tsx, find the `<table>` element and add `aria-label="Steps"`.

shared_files.note: No shared file modifications needed — all tasks touch independent files

testing_plan.regression_reason: Regression passed 18/18 last iteration (131). Risk score 1 per slot. No regression trigger.
